2381440.name: Dwarflin
2381440.description:
Dwarflin is a game about a dwarf named Flinn Pebbles whom escaped a massive storm surrounding the island of which he hails. His goal is to kill all goblins, take down their totems to dispears the massive storm that surround the dwarven island. Along the way you will meet a quirky shopkeeper named Betty that can upgrade your abilities that you can use to destroy the enemies in your path. These enemies include a mass of different goblins, drakes and kobolts, and they all have their own abilites and ways to defeat them.

Dwarflin takes place on a total of five tropical islands which represent the levels of the game, where each one of them features a different biome and holds their specifci dangers. Each island has a unique boss for each of them, giving a set goal for the levels.

"Have you made this?" - Our mothers
2381440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
